ideas.name: Marketplace Insights Realized Sold Price Baseline
ideas.what_it_does: Retrieves 90-day realized sold prices and volume for target GPUs in Australia, calculating empirical 10th and 50th percentile sold valuation medians.
ideas.why_it_helps: Replaces static asking-price medians with empirical sold-price baselines, preventing overpayment for stagnant Melbourne listings while instantly alerting on genuine mispricings below the realized 10th percentile floor.
ideas.where_it_lives: src/laptopfinder/runners/ebay_api.py in a new fetch_sold_price_baselines() helper updating static_reference_layer.json thresholds.

ideas.name: Item Feed API Pre-Caching for newlyListed Sweep
ideas.what_it_does: Ingests hourly curated category feed snapshots from eBay CDN, building a local in-memory hash table of active Australian laptop item IDs and baseline aspect dictionaries.
ideas.why_it_helps: Eliminates rate-limit exhaustion (HTTP 429) during 5-minute sniper loops by pre-caching inventory locally; the live sniper only polls delta diffs, ensuring instant detection of newly dropped Melbourne private listings.
ideas.where_it_lives: scripts/ebay_sniper.py in a new load_feed_cache() initialization function before main_loop().

ideas.name: Local Pickup & Inner-Melbourne Postcode Gating
ideas.what_it_does: Filters specifically for listings exposing itemLocation.postalCode starting with '30' (Inner/Northern Melbourne VIC) and localPickup=true or free shipping.
ideas.why_it_helps: Ensures Melbourne buyer avoids heavy courier transit risks and interstate shipping fees for workstation laptops, enabling same-day cash-on-collection inspection of VRAM specs and touchscreen digitizers.
ideas.where_it_lives: scripts/ebay_sniper.py in run_strategy_local() parameter dictionary and src/laptopfinder/runners/ebay_hunter.py local triage pass.

ideas.name: Deal & Event API Clearance Monitoring for Reseller Stock
ideas.what_it_does: Scans certified refurbished and promotional clearance laptop deals from top Australian tech resellers (e.g., Dell Outlet AU, Lenovo AU, ASUS Refurbished) for high-capacity LPDDR5X UMA models.
ideas.why_it_helps: Surfaces factory-warrantied M3 Max/Ultra or AMD Strix Halo systems with 64GB+ unified RAM at 20-30% below retail that bypass standard private-seller keyword searches.
ideas.where_it_lives: src/laptopfinder/runners/ebay_api.py in a new search_ebay_deals() function feeding into build_analysis_dict().
